TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1956, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Antony Alda, biru na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) mintzyuwaw nya Antony Alda hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1990, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Antony Alda htgan na ryax maki D'Abruzzo in St. Julie. Flora Martino hiya' ga, yaya' ni Antony. Flora hiya ga m'engi. Antony maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Leslie Clark, maki tay kawas 1977 t'alax. Antony maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Lori Carrell, maki tay kawas 1992 t'alax. Antony hiya ga maki 2 la'iy. pinqbaqan nya Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Notre Dame International pqwsan biru seneng. Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Juilliard pqwasan biru (The Juilliard School) sa New York City. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, antonj al*a, ő≤iru na ő≤uŇče Ē. (wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mintzjuwaw nja antonj al*a ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči. t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) antonj al*a ńßt…£an na rjax maki * Ēaő≤ruzzo in s~…ēt. *ulie. *lora martino ńßija Ē …£a, jaja Ē ni antonj. *lora ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči. antonj maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki les~…ēlie ¶~ ®lark, maki taj kawas~…ē **** t Ēalax. antonj maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki lori ¶~ ®arrell, maki taj kawas~…ē **** t Ēalax. antonj ńßija …£a maki * la Ēij. pinqő≤aqan nja antonj al*a tmas~…ēuq mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa notre *ame international pqws~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč. antonj al*a tmas~…ēuq mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa *uilliar* pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru (tńße *uilliar* s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool) s~…ēa new jork ¶~ ®itj. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: kawas tay 1956, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Antony Alda, biru na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) mintzyuwaw nya Antony Alda hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1990, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Antony Alda htgan na ryax maki D'Abruzzo in St. Julie. Flora Martino hiya' ga, yaya' ni Antony. Flora hiya ga m'engi. Antony maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Leslie Clark, maki tay kawas 1977 t'alax. Antony maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Lori Carrell, maki tay kawas 1992 t'alax. Antony hiya ga maki 2 la'iy. pinqbaqan nya Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Notre Dame International pqwsan biru seneng. Antony Alda tmasuq mqwas biru sa Juilliard pqwasan biru (The Juilliard School) sa New York City. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
